title: Pocket Chamber - TPA alternative
description: This mod makes the Stasis Chamber a portable item that you (or your friends) can take with them
body:
v21.3.1.0-h1 -> MC v1.21.3, Mod v1.0, hotfix 1


## Take your friends with you
 
This mod makes the Stasis Chamber a portable item that you (or your friends) can take with them.
 

They went exploring and found a nice place that you need to walk to?
-give them a Stasis Chamber with your ender pearl in it and they can take you with them.

**Throw an ender pearl at the block to insert your ender pearl into it.**

![sc animation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jaboll-ai/PocketChamber/refs/heads/main/images/stasis_chamber.gif)


**You can check the item tooltip if the chamber is occupied:**

![tooltip](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jaboll-ai/PocketChamber/refs/heads/main/images/stasis_chamber_tooltip.png)

 
**And then just right-click to teleport them :)**

![teleport showcase](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jaboll-ai/PocketChamber/refs/heads/main/images/stasis_chamber_use.gif)
